description_long: This is a folding utility knife with a robust, ergonomic handle featuring a wood-textured grip and a metallic frame. The blade is a short, replaceable, straight-edged utility blade, partially exposed and secured by a locking mechanism. The handle includes a belt clip on one side and a hook-shaped feature at the rear, likely for cutting seatbelts or cords. The metallic section of the handle is engraved with safety warnings and specifications. The overall design is compact, practical, and intended for heavy-duty or emergency use. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of handling in urban or workshop environments.
description: A compact folding utility knife with a wood-textured ergonomic handle, metallic frame, and a short, replaceable straight blade. Features include a belt clip, safety hook, and engraved metallic details.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the folded handle and partially visible blade tip.
description_view_1: Full side view displaying the wood-textured handle, metallic frame, belt clip, and exposed utility blade.
description_view_2: Edge-on view highlighting the blade's sharpness and the thickness of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hook feature at the handle's end and the blade's other side.
attribute_handle_design: contoured, wood-textured grip with metallic frame, integrated belt clip, and rear hook
